title: Wrigley Metal Roofing Co Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: Wrigley Metal Roofing Co Pty Ltd was fined $225,000 in the District Court of NSW after pleading guilty to a Work Health and Safety Act 2011 offence, following an incident on 25 July 2022 in which a worker fell nearly 3.8 metres from the roof of a residential dwelling at Avalon Beach and suffered serious injuries. The company had been engaged to assist the principal contractor with re-sheeting and cladding work at the site.
scope: Convicted and fined by the District Court of NSW for a Work Health and Safety Act breach; Incident involved a nearly 3.8 metre fall resulting in serious injury to a worker; Company pleaded guilty to failing to comply with its health and safety duty to workers
